styles.css: :host{--bg:#050915;--panel:#09101ee6;--ink:#eef5ff;--muted:#8fa4c8;--line:rgba(162,190,238,.16);--ok:#8df0bd;--warn:#ffd166;--bad:#ff7a98;--info:#7fb0ff;display:block;width:100%;height:100%;overflow:hidden;color:var(--ink);background:var(--bg);font-family:Inter,ui-sans-serif,system-ui,-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,"Segoe UI",sans-serif}*{box-sizing:border-box}button,input{font:inherit;color:inherit}.app{position:fixed;inset:0;display:grid;grid-template-rows:minmax(0,1fr) 42px;gap:6px;padding:6px;background:radial-gradient(circle at 18% -8%,rgba(50,96,165,.30),transparent 36%),linear-gradient(180deg,#081020,#040711 72%)}.stage{position:relative;min-width:0;min-height:0;overflow:hidden;border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:14px;background:linear-gradient(rgba(122,158,215,.035) 1px,transparent 1px),linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(122,158,215,.035) 1px,transparent 1px),radial-gradient(circle at 30% 0%,#17335d 0,#081322 43%,#030611 100%);background-size:18px 18px,18px 18px,auto;box-shadow:inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,.02),0 14px 34px rgba(0,0,0,.25)}.stage-port,.stage-port canvas{position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%;display:block}.stage-port canvas:last-child{touch-action:none;cursor:crosshair}.hud{position:absolute;z-index:3;left:10px;top:10px;right:10px;display:flex;gap:5px;flex-wrap:wrap;pointer-events:none}.chip{min-height:24px;padding:4px 8px;border:1px solid rgba(165,194,242,.16);border-radius:999px;background:rgba(5,10,19,.72);color:#b8cae9;font-size:10px;font-weight:850}.chip.ok{color:#baffd7;border-color:rgba(141,240,189,.32)}.chip.warn{color:#ffe39c;border-color:rgba(255,209,102,.32)}.chip.info{color:#cfe0ff;border-color:rgba(127,176,255,.30)}.panel{position:absolute;z-index:10;right:10px;top:10px;width:min(340px,calc(100% - 20px));max-height:calc(100% - 20px);overflow:auto;border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:14px;background:rgba(9,16,30,.82);box-shadow:0 18px 42px rgba(0,0,0,.35);padding:11px;display:grid;gap:10px;backdrop-filter:blur(8px)}.panel-head{display:grid;grid-template-columns:minmax(0,1fr) 30px;gap:8px;align-items:start}.close{height:28px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.10);border-radius:8px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.04);font-weight:900;cursor:pointer}.kicker{color:#7f93b9;font-size:9px;font-weight:900;letter-spacing:.10em;text-transform:uppercase}.title{display:block;margin-top:3px;font-size:16px;line-height:1.14;font-weight:900;letter-spacing:-.02em}.copy{color:#bdccec;font-size:11px;line-height:1.45}.row{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:5px}.pill{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;min-height:23px;padding:3px 7px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.10);border-radius:999px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.035);color:#dfeaff;font-size:10px;font-weight:850;white-space:nowrap}.pill.warn{color:#ffe39c;border-color:rgba(255,209,102,.32);background:rgba(255,209,102,.08)}.pill.info{color:#cfe0ff;border-color:rgba(127,176,255,.30);background:rgba(127,176,255,.07)}.pill.ok{color:#baffd7;border-color:rgba(141,240,189,.32);background:rgba(141,240,189,.08)}.section{display:grid;gap:6px}.section-title{color:#dce8fb;font-size:10px;font-weight:900;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.06em}.line{border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.07);border-radius:9px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.03);padding:6px;font-size:10px;line-height:1.35;color:#cbd9f1}.empty-hint{position:absolute;z-index:2;right:10px;bottom:56px;color:rgba(188,208,239,.75);background:rgba(5,10,19,.45);border:1px solid rgba(165,194,242,.12);border-radius:999px;padding:6px 9px;font-size:10px;pointer-events:none}.rail{min-width:0;border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:14px;background:rgba(9,16,30,.78);box-shadow:0 14px 34px rgba(0,0,0,.20);padding:6px 8px;display:grid;grid-template-columns:30px minmax(0,1fr) 30px 178px;align-items:center;gap:8px}.rail button{height:28px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.10);border-radius:9px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.04);font-weight:900;cursor:pointer}.rail input[type=range]{width:100%;accent-color:var(--ok)}.rail-small{color:var(--muted);font-size:10px;text-align:right;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis}@media(max-width:760px){.app{gap:5px;padding:5px}.panel{left:8px;right:8px;top:auto;bottom:54px;width:auto;max-height:min(42vh,340px);opacity:.94}.rail{grid-template-columns:26px minmax(0,1fr) 26px}.rail-small{display:none}.empty-hint{display:none}}

children.text: nodeを選択すると詳細を表示
